17654.title: District 9
17654.overview: Alien refugees stranded on Earth are forced to live in slum-like conditions. A government agent assigned to relocate them undergoes a disturbing transformation.

68724.title: Elysium
68724.overview: In 2154, the very wealthy live on a pristine man-made space station while the rest of the population resides on a ruined Earth.

1447540.title: Red Blood Rescue
1447540.overview: A gripping action thriller about a daring rescue mission.

76600.title: Avatar: The Way of Water
76600.overview: Set more than a decade after the events of Avatar, Jake Sully and Ney'tiri have formed a family and are doing everything to stay together. However, they must leave their home and explore the regions of Pandora.

980489.title: Gran Turismo
980489.overview: The ultimate wish-fulfillment tale of a teenage Gran Turismo player whose gaming skills won him a series of races earning him a place in the Nissan GT Academy.

523536.title: Checkered Ninja
523536.overview: A young boy teams up with a ninja sock puppet to get revenge on the man who destroyed his family.

1374534.title: Almost Cops
1374534.overview: Two friends who almost became cops find themselves in over their heads when they get mixed up in a dangerous situation.

400160.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run
400160.overview: When SpongeBob's best friend Gary is suddenly taken, SpongeBob and Patrick embark on an epic adventure to The Lost City of Atlantic City to bring him home.

72190.title: World War Z
72190.overview: Life for former United Nations investigator Gerry Lane and his family seems content. Suddenly, the world is plagued by a mysterious infection turning whole human populations into rampaging mindless zombies.

10068.title: Nine 1/2 Weeks
10068.overview: A woman begins a sexual relationship with a mysterious man she meets at a Manhattan market, who introduces her to the joys of role-playing and sexual experimentation.

64635.title: Total Recall
64635.overview: A factory worker begins to suspect that he is a spy after visiting Rekall, a company that implants false memories, and ends up on the run.

423414.title: Last Rampage
423414.overview: The story of Gary Tison, one of the most notorious criminals in Arizona history, whose daring prison escape with his three sons led to a deadly multi-state manhunt.

1447219.title: Arjun S/O Vyjayanthi
1447219.overview: An action-packed Indian drama following Arjun, the son of a legendary figure, as he fights to protect his family and community.

284279.title: Borning
284279.overview: A street racer risks everything in an illegal cross-country race across Norway.

736918.title: The Noel Diary
736918.overview: A best-selling author returns home for the holidays to settle his late mother's estate and discovers a diary that leads him to confront his troubled past.

20526.title: TRON: Legacy
20526.overview: Sam Flynn, the tech-savvy son of Kevin Flynn, looks into his father's disappearance and finds himself pulled into the same digital world of fierce programs and gladiatorial games.

98039.title: Handsome Siblings
98039.overview: Twin brothers separated at birth reunite as adults on opposite sides of the law, unaware of their connection.
